base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of font_atlas_multi_palette — a ui (hud_readout) from 1981 galaga. ASCII font atlas — A-Z + 0-9 + punctuation '-' '.' '%' '/' '?' ':' plus '(' ')' rendered at 8×8 px. Shown in 4+ palette colors (white / red / cyan / yellow) on sheet bottom-right. Used for all HUD + attract-mode text. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: ASCII font atlas — A-Z + 0-9 + punctuation '-' '.' '%' '/' '?' ':' plus '(' ')' rendered at 8×8 px. Shown in 4+ palette colors (white / red / cyan / yellow) on sheet bottom-right. Used for all HUD + attract-mode text
